coveo:metadata.title: Learn More About Windshield Wipers
coveo:metadata.description: Need new windshield wipers? Learn how to choose the right size, remove and replace wiper blades, and shop top brands at America's Tire. Free installation available!

coveo:metadata.title: All-Weather Tires – The Tip of the Iceberg
coveo:metadata.description: What’s the difference between all-season and all-weather tires? Find out here at America's Tire, your wheel and tire experts!

coveo:metadata.title: How to Get More From Your Competition Tires
coveo:metadata.description: Proper competition tire maintenance helps you get more out of your vehicle. Check out our tips for getting the most out of your competition tires at AmericasTire.com.

coveo:metadata.title: Choosing the Right Tire
coveo:metadata.description: If you find yourself asking, “What kind of tires do I need?” we’ve got you covered. Learn when to get new tires and how to choose the right tires for your vehicle.

coveo:metadata.title: Dry Rot Tires
coveo:metadata.description: What is tire rot and can it be repaired? Turn to your tire and wheel experts at America's Tire to find out!

coveo:metadata.title: Golf Cart & Garden Tires
coveo:metadata.description: Looking for lawn and garden tires? We’ve got a huge inventory of lawn mower tires, golf cart tires and wheelbarrow tires. Get all your tire needs met at America's Tire.

coveo:metadata.title: How Long Do Tires Last?
coveo:metadata.description: Wondering how long your car tires should last? We break it down to help you understand tire age, tread life expectancy and tire lifespan.

coveo:metadata.title: Tire Mixing Basics: Can You Mix New and Old Tires?
coveo:metadata.description: Learn when it’s safe to mix tires, replace only one or two tires, and how tire mixing affects winter tires, run-flat tires, and AWD vehicles.

coveo:metadata.title: Mixing Tire Tread Depths
coveo:metadata.description: Is mixing tread depths on your tires a good idea? Does using different tread depths on the same axle make a difference? Find out at America's Tire!

coveo:metadata.title: Original Equipment (OE) Tires vs. New Aftermarket Tires
coveo:metadata.description: Wondering what the difference is between your stock tires and a fresh set of aftermarket tires? We’ll show you the differences, so you can make an informed purchase.

coveo:metadata.title: Truck Tires – Passenger Tires vs LT Tires
coveo:metadata.description: What does LT mean on a tire? Learn everything you need to know about LT tires, passenger tires and how they differ, right here at America's Tire.

coveo:metadata.title: Plus Sizing Tires & Wheels
coveo:metadata.description: Do you like ‘em big? Plus size tires and wheels are a serious look to consider for your ride. Learn more at America's Tire, your wheel and tire experts!

coveo:metadata.title: Guide to AWD and 4WD
coveo:metadata.description: When it comes to replacing the tires on your AWD or 4WD vehicle, what’s the best tactic? We’ll break down the ins and outs of tire replacement on these types of rigs!

coveo:metadata.title: Replacing Two Tires
coveo:metadata.description: Planning on only replacing two tires? Be sure you install them in the right spot. At America's Tire, we’ll make sure you get your two new tires installed properly!

coveo:metadata.title: What Are Run Flat Tires?
coveo:metadata.description: Are you curious about run-flat tires? Learn about their benefits, how they work and if they’re right for you. Upgrade your tires today at America's Tire!

coveo:metadata.title: What is a Staggered Fitment?
coveo:metadata.description: What is a staggered tire? Is it the same thing as a staggered wheel, rim or fitment? Turn to us at America's Tire, your wheel and tire experts, to find out!

coveo:metadata.title: Tire Fees: What to Know
coveo:metadata.description: On the hunt for new tires? Learn all about tire recycling fees and how fees are broken down by state.

coveo:metadata.title: Tire Installation Cost Breakdown
coveo:metadata.description: If you’re looking for tire installation near you that combines safety and value, we’ve got you covered. Learn about tire installation costs at America's Tire here.

coveo:metadata.title: Tire Size Comparison Tips
coveo:metadata.description: Learn all about tire size comparisons and how to find the best tire for your ride! Whether you’re re-upping the rubber on your pickup, SUV or sports car, we’ve got the deets on all your tire size needs!

coveo:metadata.title: Common Tire Tread Patterns
coveo:metadata.description: What are the most common tire tread patterns? We’ll break down the different types of tire tread patterns, including directional tires and asymmetrical tires.

coveo:metadata.title: Tire Warranties
coveo:metadata.description: What does your tire warranty cover? How does it work? We can help you get the most from your tire warranty while protecting your tires for the long haul.

coveo:metadata.title: Tire Wear Patterns
coveo:metadata.description: Want to learn about tire wear patterns? Our tire wear patterns guide has all the details on inside tire wear, outside tire wear, uneven tire wear, and more.

coveo:metadata.title: Safely Maintaining Trailer Tires
coveo:metadata.description: Not sure where to start when it comes to maintaining your trailer tires? Start here with us at America's Tire, your tire and wheel experts!

coveo:metadata.title: Vehicle Trim & Assembly
coveo:metadata.description: What trim is my car? Does my tire assembly make a difference when I buy tires? Find out all of this and more at America's Tire, your tire and wheel experts!

coveo:metadata.title: When Should You Replace Your Tires? Age, Tread and Cost Guide
coveo:metadata.description: When should you replace your tires? Discover the signs, such as tread depth limits, age guidelines, warning signs, and more from your tire experts at America's Tire.

coveo:metadata.title: How to Clean Wheels
coveo:metadata.description: Wondering how to clean your wheels? Whether you need to clean aluminum wheels or chrome rims, we can show you how to keep your rims stylish, without hurting their finish!

coveo:metadata.title: Hub-Centric vs. Lug-Centric Wheels
coveo:metadata.description: What’s the difference between lug-centric and hub-centric wheels? Learn all there is to know about hub centric wheels, lug centric wheels and hub rings.

coveo:metadata.title: What Are Hub-Centric Rings?
coveo:metadata.description: Do I need hub centric rings? What are hub centric rings? Find out more at America's Tire, your tire and wheel experts!

coveo:metadata.title: Forged Wheels: The Benefits of Lightweight Rims
coveo:metadata.description: Are forged lightweight wheels for you? Learn all about them and more at America's Tire, your tire and wheel experts!

coveo:metadata.title: Lug Nuts
coveo:metadata.description: Want to learn more about lug nuts? Whether you’re researching your OE lug nuts or a new set of aftermarket lug nuts, learn what you need to know at America's Tire.

coveo:metadata.title: OE Lug Nut Replacement
coveo:metadata.description: Want to learn how to replace lug nuts, both original equipment and aftermarket bolts? Find out here at America's Tire, your tire and wheel experts!

coveo:metadata.title: How to Measure Rim Width
coveo:metadata.description: When it comes to measuring rim width, we’ve got all the details. Learn how to measure rim width, plus find out how wheel width impacts your ride’s performance.

coveo:metadata.title: Wheel Configurator
coveo:metadata.description: What rims will fit your car? Use our wheel configurator, AKA wheel visualizer, to see how wheels or rims look on your car!

coveo:metadata.title: The Difference Between Rims, Wheels and Hubcaps
coveo:metadata.description: Can’t keep a hub cap, center cap, wheel or rim straight? Let America's Tire straighten you out! Need new wheels/rims? We've got you covered for that, too!

coveo:metadata.title: Bolt Patterns 101
coveo:metadata.description: Wondering what your wheel bolt pattern is? Learn about lug patterns, how to measure bolt patterns, and check out our bolt pattern conversion chart!

coveo:metadata.title: Valve Stems
coveo:metadata.description: What is a valve stem and how does it work? America's Tire, your tire and wheel experts, explain the types and parts of a valve stem and more!

coveo:metadata.title: Wheel Alignment
coveo:metadata.description: Do you think you need a wheel or tire alignment? Turn to the tire and wheel experts at America's Tire to help you get your car alignment in order!

coveo:metadata.title: Wheel Construction
coveo:metadata.description: When it comes to wheel construction, there are many different types of rims. We’ll break down all the types of wheels so you can find the perfect rims for your ride!

coveo:metadata.title: Types of Wheel Finishes
coveo:metadata.description: What’s better, powder coating rims or machined finish rims? With so many different wheel finish options, learn all about wheel finishes and which one is best for you!

coveo:metadata.title: Wheel Installation Kits
coveo:metadata.description: Looking to freshen up your ride with a new set of wheels? Be sure you’ve got the right wheel installation kit for the job!

coveo:metadata.title: Understanding Wheel Offset and Backspacing
coveo:metadata.description: Do you know what wheel offset and backspacing are? Learn about offset rims and custom wheel offset with our handy chart. Plus, learn how to measure wheel backspacing!

coveo:metadata.title: Wheel Size Basics
coveo:metadata.description: Want to learn about wheel size? We’ve got the rundown on wheel size, including how to measure wheel size, wheel diameter, wheel width, and more.

coveo:metadata.title: Wheel Torque Specifications
coveo:metadata.description: Find essential lug nut torque and wheel torque specs for your vehicle for a proper wheel installation right here! Learn more about proper lug nut torque specifications for your vehicle.

coveo:metadata.title: Wheel Weight
coveo:metadata.description: Wondering how wheel weight impacts your ride? How much your wheels weigh can have a massive effect on your ride. Learn how at America's Tire!

coveo:metadata.title: Winter Wheels
coveo:metadata.description: Save the finish and luster of your everyday wheels and get some winter wheels when snow hits the ground. America's Tire can get you the best winter wheels for your vehicle.

coveo:metadata.title: How to Read Tire Size: Tire Size Meaning, Format & Fitment Guide
coveo:metadata.description: Confused by tire numbers? Learn how to read your tire size with our simple guide. We’ll teach you where to find it and what it means!

coveo:metadata.title: Tire Size and Conversion Calculator
coveo:metadata.description: Use our tire size calculator or tire size chart to do a quick side-by-side tire size comparison. If you plan on upsizing or downsizing your tires, our tire calculator can help you make sure you get the ideal tire size for you!

coveo:metadata.title: How To Break In New Tires
coveo:metadata.description: When it comes to breaking in new tires, there’s a huge benefit to doing it right. Whether you’re breaking in everyday commuter tires or performance tires, we’ve got the details.

coveo:metadata.title: What are Flotation Tires?
coveo:metadata.description: Do you know the difference between flotation tires and metric tires? Learn all about flotation tires for your truck, ATV flotation tires, and more.

coveo:metadata.title: Tire and Wheel Definitions
coveo:metadata.description: Wondering about the different tire definitions out there? For instance, what does the middle number on a tire mean? We break down the tire terminology for you!

coveo:metadata.title: How To Change A Tire
coveo:metadata.description: Be prepared for the unexpected by learning how to change a tire quickly and easily. Check out America's Tire’s step-by-step guide to stay safe on the road!

coveo:metadata.title: How to Clean Your Tires
coveo:metadata.description: Want to learn the best way to clean your tires? We’ve got you covered! Learn how to clean your tires and what makes the best tire cleaner at America's Tire.

coveo:metadata.title: Load Range vs. Load Index
coveo:metadata.description: Are you confused about the difference between tire load index and tire load range? Turn to America's Tire, your tire experts!

coveo:metadata.title: Our Tire Mounting and Balancing Process
coveo:metadata.description: Do you want to know about tire mounting and balancing? Your tire and wheel experts at America's Tire break down the process and cost.

coveo:metadata.title: All About Fuel Efficient Low Rolling Resistance Tires
coveo:metadata.description: Looking for gas-friendly tires? Learn about low rolling resistance tires and how they can improve your vehicle’s fuel efficiency!

coveo:metadata.title: Treadwell, Tire Efficiency and EV Range
coveo:metadata.description: EV range can be more efficient with the right tires. Learn all about tire efficiency, EV battery range and how our latest update to Treadwell is all about tire efficiency!

coveo:metadata.title: Spare Tire Maintenance
coveo:metadata.description: Don’t forget about your spare! We’ll teach you all about spare tire maintenance from a compact donut to a full sized spare tire.

coveo:metadata.title: Tire Size and Speedometer Accuracy
coveo:metadata.description: Do bigger tires make your speedometer faster? Find this out and more from your wheel and tire experts at America's Tire!

coveo:metadata.title: Proper Tire Storage
coveo:metadata.description: Proper storage for tires ensures they last and function to their fullest expected lifespan. We’ve compiled the best practices for storing your tires.

coveo:metadata.title: Scrap Tires and the Environment
coveo:metadata.description: How do tires and scrap tires affect the environment? Find out at America's Tire, your tire and wheel experts!

coveo:metadata.title: Dual Wheel Trucks (Dually)
coveo:metadata.description: Learn everything about dual (dually) wheel trucks: from how they work, how to maintain them, and how to install them from the experts at America's Tire.

coveo:metadata.title: Bent Rims and Unbalanced Tires: Vehicle Vibration 101
coveo:metadata.description: Is your steering wheel vibrating? It might be a bent rim or unbalanced tire. Find out more at America's Tire, your wheel and tire experts!

coveo:metadata.title: How to Keep Tire Noise Down
coveo:metadata.description: Hearing loud tire noise at highway speeds? Here are a few potential causes of tire road noise and how to get peace and quiet on your commute.

coveo:metadata.title: What To Do With Old Tires
coveo:metadata.description: Do you have an old set of tires laying around? Or are your current tires starting to wear a little low? America's Tire explains how to recycle or reuse your tires!

coveo:metadata.title: America's Tire Videos
coveo:metadata.description: From our classic commercials to educational videos about tires and wheels, we’ve got fun and informative videos about tires, wheels and safety!

coveo:metadata.title: Tire Construction
coveo:metadata.description: Do you know what the parts of a tire are? A tire belt? Tire construction is super important to its performance. Learn more at America's Tire!

coveo:metadata.title: Understanding the Contact Patch
coveo:metadata.description: Do you know the purpose of a contact patch for a tire? Find out at America's Tire, your tire and wheel experts!

coveo:metadata.title: Types of Tires
coveo:metadata.description: From off-road to track day, there are a huge variety of tire types. Different vehicles need different types of tires. We can help you find the best tire for your vehicle.

coveo:metadata.title: DOT Tire Identification Number
coveo:metadata.description: Wondering what your tire DOT code means? At America's Tire, we’ll show you all about how to read the DOT numbers on your tire, including how to read your tire date code.

coveo:metadata.title: How to Read Tire Sidewall
coveo:metadata.description: Ever asked yourself, what do the numbers on a tire mean? Learn all about your tire sidewall, how to read your tire numbers, and what the codes mean at America's Tire.

coveo:metadata.title: Section Width
coveo:metadata.description: Do you know what the section width of a tire is? Learn all about tire section width at America's Tire, your tire and wheel experts!

coveo:metadata.title: Sidewall Inspection
coveo:metadata.description: Do you have tire sidewall damage? Learn how to perform a tire sidewall inspection so you can avoid common damages, including a bubble in your tire sidewall.

coveo:metadata.title: What Are Tire Speed Ratings?
coveo:metadata.description: Wondering what your tire speed rating is? From W speed rating to V speed rating, we’ve got you covered. Use our chart to learn what speed rating means for your tire.

coveo:metadata.title: Euro-Metric vs. P-Metric
coveo:metadata.description: While both Euro-metric and P-metric tires are intended for passenger car use, there is a difference in the load carrying capacities. Learn more about it here!

coveo:metadata.title: Tire Dimensions
coveo:metadata.description: Do you know how tires are measured? America's Tire teaches you all about section width, tread width and more so you can understand your tires better!

coveo:metadata.title: Evaluating Tire Performance Features
coveo:metadata.description: Different types of tires have different pros and cons which help them function and perform the way they were intended. Find out more at America's Tire.

coveo:metadata.title: Tire Sipes
coveo:metadata.description: What is tire siping? Should you get your tires siped? Learn all about tire siping and more by your wheel and tire experts at America's Tire!

coveo:metadata.title: The UTQG Tire Rating System
coveo:metadata.description: What are those letters on my tire? Discover the hidden meaning behind the UTQG tire rating system to unlock the key to longer-lasting tires at America's Tire!

coveo:metadata.title: Asymmetric vs Directional Tread
coveo:metadata.description: Not sure which direction to go? America's Tire gives you the low down on asymmetric vs directional tread tires!

coveo:metadata.title: Correct Air Pressure
coveo:metadata.description: Do you know what the proper PSI is for your tires? Learn about normal and recommended tire pressure and how to inflate your tires at America's Tire.

coveo:metadata.title: How to Check Tire Pressure: A Step-By-Step Guide for Safe, Properly Inflated Tires
coveo:metadata.description: Learn how to check your tire pressure with this simple step-by-step guide. Improve safety, tire lifespan, and performance with these tire inflation tips from America's Tire

coveo:metadata.title: Is Nitrogen Better Than Air For Your Tires?
coveo:metadata.description: When it comes to filling your tires, what is the difference between regular air and nitrogen? Which is better? Learn more about using nitrogen in tires from the experts.

coveo:metadata.title: Correct Tire Inflation Improves Fuel Economy
coveo:metadata.description: Wondering how air pressure impacts your ride’s fuel economy? We cover that and more, right here. We also give out free complimentary air checks!

coveo:metadata.title: Fuel Calculator: The Cost of Low Air Pressure
coveo:metadata.description: You can save gas and money through proper tire inflation. Use the americastire.com pressure calculator to see how much you could save.

coveo:metadata.title: Tire Air Pressure and Temperature Changes
coveo:metadata.description: Did you know that tire pressure changes with the temperature? Learn more about it at America's Tire, your wheel and tire experts!

coveo:metadata.title: Tire Air Pressure and Treadwear
coveo:metadata.description: Did you know that your tire air pressure can directly impact your tire treadwear? Learn how overinflation and underinflation causes premature tire treadwear at America's Tire!

coveo:metadata.title: Tire Pressure's Effect on Wet Weather Performance
coveo:metadata.description: Did you know that the weather affects tire pressure? Tire pressure has a big impact on whether you hydroplane in wet conditions. Learn more at America's Tire.

coveo:metadata.title: Tire Pressure's Effect on Dry Weather Performance
coveo:metadata.description: Did you know that tire pressure directly affects your tire’s performance in dry weather? Learn more at Americas Tire, your tire and wheel experts!

coveo:metadata.title: Overloading and Underinflation
coveo:metadata.description: Overloading and under inflating your tires is a really bad combination. Learn more at America's Tire, your tire and wheel experts!

coveo:metadata.title: What is Tire Pressure Monitoring System (TPMS)?
coveo:metadata.description: What is a TPMS sensor? Tire pressure sensors are now a standard safety feature in vehicles. Learn all about them at America's Tire, your wheel and tire experts!

coveo:metadata.title: Hydroplaning and the role your tires play
coveo:metadata.description: Wondering what causes hydroplaning and how you can avoid it? We’ve got the skinny on hydroplaning, how and why your tires hydroplane and even how you can try to avoid it!

coveo:metadata.title: Winter/Snow Tires FAQs
coveo:metadata.description: Winter tires vs snow tires: what’s the difference? Do I need winter tires? No matter what questions you have, we've got you covered with our winter tire FAQ!

coveo:metadata.title: Winter/Snow Tire Changeover and Installation
coveo:metadata.description: Switching to winter tires is about proper installation and timing in order to make winter driving safer. Learn more at AmericasTire.com.

coveo:metadata.title: Three-Peak Mountain Snowflake Symbol Tires
coveo:metadata.description: Do your tires have a severe snow service rating? Only tires with the 3 Peak Mountain Snowflake symbol qualify as severe weather worthy. Find out more at America's Tire.

coveo:metadata.title: Tires Below 45 Degrees
coveo:metadata.description: Did you know that winter tires work best in temperatures under 45 degrees Fahrenheit? Learn more about winter tires at America's Tire, you tire and wheel experts!

coveo:metadata.title: Studded Winter/Snow Tires vs. Tire Chains
coveo:metadata.description: In the battle between studded winter tires and tire chains, who wins? We break down the difference between studded tires, winter tires and tire chains, so you can make the best snow tire choice to face the demands of your winter drive!

coveo:metadata.title: High-Performance Winter/Snow Tires
coveo:metadata.description: What are performance winter tires? Performance winter tires are your best bet for your muscle car or performance passenger vehicle! Learn more about them at America's Tire.

coveo:metadata.title: How do All-Terrain and Mud Tires do in Snow?
coveo:metadata.description: Are mud and all terrain tires good in the snow? Find out at America's Tire, your tire and wheel experts!

coveo:metadata.title: All-Season vs. Summer vs. Winter/Snow Tires
coveo:metadata.description: Do you know the difference between summer and winter tires? What about summer and all-season tires? Learn the differences at America's Tire.

coveo:metadata.title: Winter Driving Tips
coveo:metadata.description: Stay steady this winter with our winter tire and driving safety tips from your tire and wheel experts, America's Tire!

coveo:metadata.title: Tire Safety Practices
coveo:metadata.description: At America's Tire, your safety is our number one priority. Learn about essential practices to keep your tires in optimal condition and keep you safe on the road!

coveo:metadata.title: Myths About Tires and Tire Safety
coveo:metadata.description: From Tire Pressure Monitoring Systems to the best way to safely repair tires, we’re breaking down tire safety myths to help you stay safe on the road.

coveo:metadata.title: How to Check Tire Tread Depth
coveo:metadata.description: Measure your tire tread depth with the penny tire test and the quarter tire tread test. Use our easy-to-follow guide to check your tire tread.

coveo:metadata.title: Tire Tread and Stopping Distance
coveo:metadata.description: Worn tire tread can increase your stopping distance. Learn how to stay safe with tips from the experts at America's Tire.

coveo:metadata.title: Customer Tire Ratings and Reviews
coveo:metadata.description: Looking for tire reviews or ratings? We’ve got customer reviews on many of our most popular tires. No need for guesswork, just see our reviews from real drivers!

coveo:metadata.title: Tire Repair
coveo:metadata.description: Do you know anything about tire repair? We do! The name of the game at America's Tire is tire repair. Learn more!

coveo:metadata.title: Spring Driving Tips
coveo:metadata.description: America's Tire believes in safety first so we’ve compiled a list of driving tips during the rainy spring season!

coveo:metadata.title: Summer Driving Tips for Safer Travel
coveo:metadata.description: Get summer driving tips to stay safe on the road. Learn how heat, storms, traffic, and tire care can affect your drive and how to prepare.

coveo:metadata.title: Fall Driving Tips
coveo:metadata.description: Keep safe this autumn with the best fall driving tips from your tire experts at America's Tire.

coveo:metadata.title: Wet Weather Driving Tips
coveo:metadata.description: When gray skies promise rain, be sure you’re ready to tackle the challenges of wet weather driving. We’ve got all the wet weather driving tips you need to stay safe.

coveo:metadata.title: Tire Inspection
coveo:metadata.description: Let America's Tire’s trusted experts perform a safety check on your tires. We’ll inspect your tires for damage, tread wear, proper air pressure, and more.

coveo:metadata.title: How America's Tire Safely Repairs Your Tire
coveo:metadata.description: Learn how America's Tire safely repairs flat tires using a professional 18-step process. See what makes a tire repairable, when replacement is required, and how we prioritize your safety.

coveo:metadata.title: What is Road Force Balancing?
coveo:metadata.description: Learn the difference between tire balancing and road force balancing, including ride matching and how to reduce wheel vibration for a smoother ride.

coveo:metadata.title: Tire Balancing
coveo:metadata.description: America's Tire recommends balancing tires every 6000 miles. Correct ride vibrations with routine tire balancing.

coveo:metadata.title: Tire Rotation Basics
coveo:metadata.description: Wondering what a tire rotation is? We’ve got all the deets on tire rotations, how to rotate tires, and the most common tire rotation patterns!

coveo:metadata.title: How to Rotate Directional Tires
coveo:metadata.description: Do you know how to rotate directional tires? America's Tire explains how!

coveo:metadata.title: Services Not Offered
coveo:metadata.description: Does America's Tire offer oil changes or state inspections? Learn why America's Tire focuses exclusively on tire and wheel services–and what vehicle maintenance they don’t provide.
